summary: Raw Fox News 'Hannity' interview clip of DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin talking about Biden-era border releases vs. Trump enforcement, shown as a talking head over a Washington DC backdrop with network chyrons. No music or stylized editing; it is a straight cable-news segment, not youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: MARKWAYNE MULLIN / DHS SECRETARY; HANNITY / Hang Out with Sean Hannity; 'TRUMP ADMIN CLEANS UP MESS CREATED BY BIDEN'S OPEN BORDER'; FOX NEWS / BREAKING NEWS
